overview.description: The Direxion Daily Junior Gold Miners Index Bull 2X ETF (JNUG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MVIS Global Junior Gold Miners index. The fund provides daily 2x exposure to an index of junior gold and silver mining companies from developed as well as emerging markets. JNUG was launched on Oct 3, 2013 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: ETF leader board dominated by nimble funds
data.text: The top annual ETF performers share a common trait, the firm behind them and investors who are ready to trade no matter which direction the market goes.

data.title: Wealthy investors tap ETFs for three hot assets, according to Goldman Sachs
data.text: A new Goldman Sachs report reveals how family offices, a collection of the world's wealthy, are investing in hot areas including gold, cryptocurrency and artificial intelligence.
